summary: Retrieve trips for a given location

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: The latitude coordinate of the search center

parameters.name: lon
parameters.description: The longitude coordinate of the search center

parameters.name: latSpan
parameters.description: Latitude span of the search bounding box

parameters.name: lonSpan
parameters.description: Longitude span of the search bounding box

parameters.name: includeTrip
parameters.description: Whether to include full trip elements in the references section. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: includeSchedule
parameters.description: Whether to include full schedule elements in the tripDetails section. Defaults to false.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: Specific time for the query. Defaults to the current time.
